scripts.prisma_push_generate: npm run prisma_push && npm run prisma_generate
scripts.prisma_push_generate_seed: npm run prisma_push_generate && npm run prisma_seed
scripts.build_start: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.dev_prisma: npm run prisma_push_generate && npm run dev
scripts.dev_seed: npm run prisma_push_generate_seed && npm run dev
scripts.prod_prisma_build_start: npm run prisma_push_generate && npm run build_start
scripts.prod_seed_build_start: npm run prisma_push_generate_seed && npm run build_start
scripts.prod_prisma_start: npm run prisma_push_generate && npm run start
scripts.prod_seed_start: npm run prisma_push_generate_seed && npm run start
